description.plain: Heavy duty wall mount for ultrawide monitors, offering full motion adjustment and cable management for a clean, ergonomic workspace.

unique_selling_points: Accommodates both flat and curved ultrawide monitors from 22 to 49 inches with full motion adjustment and integrated cable management.
metadata.top_features:
Fits 22 to 49 inch ultrawide flat and curved monitors for broad compatibility
Full motion adjustment with 360° rotation, 90° tilt, and 90° swivel for ergonomic positioning
Integrated cable management keeps power and data cords organized and out of sight
Retractable arm design allows for compact storage against the wall
Durable steel construction with gas spring mechanism ensures stability and smooth operation
metadata.tech_specs:

Compatible Screen Sizes: 22 to 49 inches (flat and curved)
VESA Mount Compatibility: 75x75mm and 100x100mm
Material: High quality steel
Retractable Length: 5 inches
Mounting Surfaces: Wood studs, solid concrete, brick

media.alt_text: Mountory Monitor Wall Mount fits 22"-49" Ultrawide Flat & Curved Screens, Heavy Duty Single Monitor Wall Arm Holds 2.2 to 44 lbs, Full Motion Adjustable Wall Bracket, VESA Mount 75x75mm/100x100mm

variants.title: Mountory Monitor Wall Mount fits 22"-49" Ultrawide Flat & Curved Screens, Heavy Duty Single Monitor Wall Arm Holds 2.2 to 44 lbs, Full Motion Adjustable Wall Bracket, VESA Mount 75x75mm/100x100mm

description.plain: Optimized for Ultrawide Monitor - This durable, single monitor wall arm is designed to accommodate the majority of 22″ to 49″ flat and curved screens, delivering reliable support and flexible positioning. It holds curved monitors from 2.2 to 30.9 lbs and flat screens ranging from 2.2 to 44 lbs, making it ideal for a wide variety of ultrawide setups. Fully compatible with top brands including Samsung Odyssey G9, LG, Dell, ASUS, Acer, MSI, HP, Sceptre, and other leading models. Fits popular screen sizes such as 49", 43", 42", 39", 38", 35", 34", 32", 27", 24", and 22". Noted: The VESA adapter required for Samsung monitors is sold separately and not included with this mount. Elevate Your Monitor Save Up Your Space - Designed for simplicity and style, Mountory computer monitor wall mount lifts your ultra-wide screen off the desktop and mounts it securely on the wall at an ergonomic height—giving you a cleaner, more spacious, and organized workspace. The sleek, adjustable arm retracts to just 5 inches when not in use, tucking neatly against the wall for a minimalist look. Built-in cable management keeps power and data cords neatly contained, eliminating messy tangles and maintaining a tidy, professional setup all day, every day. It’s not just a mount—it’s a smarter way to work. Smooth, Full-Range Mobility - Engineered for ultimate flexibility, this wall mount bracket delivers complete motion control with 360° rotation to effortlessly switch between landscape and portrait orientations, +90° to -45° tilt for precision angle adjustment, and ±90° swivel that makes sharing your screen smooth and intuitive. Whether you're fine-tuning your viewing position or repositioning for collaboration, the full range of motion allows you to quickly achieve your perfect ergonomic setup—maximizing both comfort and productivity. Enhanced Pneumatic Support – Built for lasting performance, this VESA wall mount combines robust construction with advanced engineering. Constructed from high-quality steel and equipped with an upgraded gas spring mechanism—tested to endure over 20,000 lift and tilt cycles—it delivers exceptional durability. The improved pneumatic system minimizes vibrations and wobbling during adjustments, ensuring your screen remains steady and securely positioned at all times. Smooth & Simple Setup - This kit includes clear, step-by-step instructions and pre-labeled hardware components—making setup quick and stress-free. Compatible with wood studs, solid concrete, and brick walls, it’s built to suit a variety of mounting surfaces. Before purchasing, please confirm your wall type to ensure proper installation and maximum safety. Important: Do not attempt to mount on drywall alone

products.title: MOUNT PRO Single Monitor Wall Mount for 13 to 32 Inch Computer Screens, Height Adjustable Wall Mount Monitor Arm Holds Up to 19.8lbs, Full Motion Wall Bracket, VESA Mount 75x75, 100x100, Black

media.alt_text: MOUNT PRO Single Monitor Wall Mount for 13 to 32 Inch Computer Screens, Height Adjustable Wall Mount Monitor Arm Holds Up to 19.8lbs, Full Motion Wall Bracket, VESA Mount 75x75, 100x100, Black

variants.title: MOUNT PRO Single Monitor Wall Mount for 13 to 32 Inch Computer Screens, Height Adjustable Wall Mount Monitor Arm Holds Up to 19.8lbs, Full Motion Wall Bracket, VESA Mount 75x75, 100x100, Black

description.plain: About This Full Motion Adjustments - Adjustable monitor wall mount arm offers +90° to -90° tilts, 180° swivel, and 360° rotation. This monitor arm extends up to 21.6", making it easy to set the monitor at the optimum angle and position for increased productivity and comfort. Wide Compatibility - This computer monitor wall mount widely fits 13 - 32 Inch computer Screens with VESA pattern 75x75mm and 100x100mm, not limited to 32 30 28 27 25 24 23 22 21 20 19 17 inch screen, but not compatible with 1000R/1500R/1800R curved screens, and supports 4.4-19.8lbs monitors. Free up your desktop space - This wall monitor mount holds your monitor on the wall, free up much valuable space on your workstation. The easily detachable integrated cable management system helps keep AV and power cords out of sight and organized. Effortless Height Adjustment System - This wall monitor arm is built for thousands of movement by passing 10000-cycle tests, which achieve flexibility and stability than traditional mechanical monitor stand. It can be adjusted to the weight of your monitor creating a suspended free-float effect. Please adjust it according to your monitor weight before use. Easy Assembly - This pc monitor wall mount fits both wood stud and solid concrete walls. When installing this monitor mount on the wood stud wall, Please don’t use the anchor in drywall or wood. While installing on the solid concrete wall, the provides anchor is needed. Comes with all necessary hardware and instructions, this vesa monitor wall mount can be installed within 10 minutes. MOUNT PRO single monitor mount enjoy a lifetime of technical support if you have any questions. Overview Mounting Type : Wall Mount Movement Type : Articulating, Rotate Brand : MOUNT PRO Material : Metal Color : Black Compatible Devices : Monitor Maximum Tilt Angle : 45 Degrees Manufacturer : MOUNT PRO

description.plain: About This More Stable than Desk Monitor Mount - This single monitor wall mount is mounted on the wall, it is more stable than the desk monitor stand and will not damage your expensive desk. And maximize your work space to put keyboard or files with this wall mount monitor arm. Full Motion Adjustable Monitor Wall Mount - Adjustable wall mount monitor arm offers -35° to +35° tilt, 180° swivel, 360° rotation. The wall mount monitor arm can be extended up to 18.3"(to the wall) supporting you a more optimal viewing angle, helps to reduce the pain in your neck, shoulders, and back. Compatible with Most VESA Sizes - HUANUO single monitor wall mount comes with a VESA extension kit that fits most 17" to 32" monitors weighing up to 17.6lbs. Compatible with VESA sizes 75mm x 75mm and 100mm x 100mm. (Please verify your monitors size and weight are within our standard before purchase) Advanced System - The wall mount monitor arm integrated counterbalance adjusts to the weight of your monitor creating a suspended free-float effect, that allows to adjust monitor height more smoothly.(Adjust it according to your monitor weight before use) Easy Installation - All necessary hardware and instructions are provided for assembly, and mounting your monitor is a simple process. The monitor wall mount is easy to install in 10 minutes or less so you can get focused and start working right away. description.plain: About This TWO MOUNTING OPTIONS: This monitor mount is as flexible as you need it to be. Whether you decide to mount it to the wall or to an existing pole, we got you covered! Installation brackets for both wall and pole are included with this single monitor arm so that you can create the workspace you desire. And to ensure that everything looks clean and organized, we added a cable management feature, too. FULL MOTION ADJUSTMENTS: The spring arm allows for effortless height and tilt adjustments, ensuring you find the perfect viewing angle in seconds. Share your screen easily with the 180° swivel feature and switch between landscape and portrait orientation with the 360° screen rotation capability. The monitor arm extends up to 21.8" and allows you to bring your screen closer to you to find the perfect viewing distance. VERSATILE DESIGN: This innovative and versatile monitor wall mount fits a wide variety of displays between 17 and 32 inches screen size and up to 15.4 lbs weight. The mounting bracket fits VESA 75x75 and 100x100. Please ensure your monitor is compatible with these VESA hole patterns before purchase. EASY INSTALLATION: Your new counterbalance monitor arm comes with all necessary hardware and easy-to-follow instructions for a hassle-free setup process. Choose between mounting the spring arm to the wall with the included wall mounting base. Alternatively, install the arm on an existing pole with the included pole mounting clamp (pole not included). Thn simply attach your monitor using the VESA holes and you're ready to go! QUALITY PROMISE: This Mount-It! monitor arm for pole and wall mounting comes with a LIFETIME warranty and our knowledgeable and responsive US-based customer support team is available to answer any questions you may have during standard business hours Overview Mounting Type : Wall Mount Movement Type : Articulating, Rotate, Swivel, Tilt Brand : Mount-It! Material : Metal Color : Black, White Compatible Devices : Monitor Maximum Tilt Angle : 90 Degrees Global Trade Identification Number : 00810041738141 UPC : 810041738141 Manufacturer : Mount-It!
